goal: Complete capability truth so every formal first-class public surface is represented in capability evidence and scorecard outputs with explicit gate reason semantics.
successCriteria: Capability evidence and scorecard cover all formal first-class public surfaces or record explicit exclusion reasons.
Latest gate status and artifact fields never render unexplained blanks.
No runtime behavior change is introduced in the truth-completion package.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No new runtime or cloud API behavior.
No maturity promotion without separate tracked decision artifacts.

liveVerifyStatus.note: This package updates capability truth, scorecard rendering, and gate-reason semantics without requiring live cloud credentials.
